items.title: DIVIDEND DECLARATION - Wheaton Precious Metals Announces Quarterly Dividend
items.summary: Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. announced its second quarterly cash dividend for 2026 of US$0.195 per common share, representing an 18% increase from the same period in 2025. The dividend will be paid on June 9, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 27, 2026. The company continues to offer a Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRIP) with treasury share issuances at average market price without discount.
